options.name: -checkLegality
options.description: Checks the legality of pin assignment (similar to the checkPinAssignment command) and prints a summary report of the results.

options.name: -noHtml
options.description: Specifies that HTML report file should not be created.

options.name: -outFile
options.description: In addition to displaying the report on screen, prints the report to the specified file.
